feedback.text: As a Czech and EU citizen, I strongly believe that video games should be brought under the protection of the Digital Fairness Act. With a vast collection of titles across multiple platforms, I am deeply concerned that games I have legally acquired can be removed or rendered inaccessible without any clear justification. There is currently a European Citizens' Initiative titled Stop destroying video games, which seeks to address this very issue. The petition is open until 31 July 2025 and has already received support from over 1.4 million signatories. Simply searching "Stop destroying games Initiative" will lead you to the official EU petition page. Thank you for your continued efforts in promoting digital consumer rights. I urge you to consider the importance of preserving access to video games as part of this legislation.
